# Google Weather Open API

> Open reverse-engineered client for Google Pixel Weather (`com.google.android.apps.weather`) weatherhub gRPC. Call location, forecast, AQI, pollen, and maps with public Android-restricted client headers — no Google account for read APIs. Python package exposes REST-like methods and an optional local JSON REST proxy.

Important notes:

- Not an official Google product. Respect Google Terms of Service and rate limits.
- Transport under the hood is gRPC over HTTP/2 to `pixelweatherhub-pa.googleapis.com`. The Python library and local REST proxy hide that; users work with JSON dicts / `GET /v1/...`.
- Default credentials (API key + Android package + cert + client-id) are public client fields from the stock APK, not user secrets.
- `UserPreferenceService` (saved places / block layouts) requires OAuth scope `https://www.googleapis.com/auth/pixelweatherhub`.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/MrFaDeveloper/GoogleWeatherOpenAPI/blob/main/README.md): project overview and first successful request
- [Wiki home](https://github.com/MrFaDeveloper/GoogleWeatherOpenAPI/wiki): full human wiki index
- [Credentials & auth](https://github.com/MrFaDeveloper/GoogleWeatherOpenAPI/blob/main/docs/auth.md): exact headers, API key, cert, OAuth wall
- [Credentials wiki](https://github.com/MrFaDeveloper/GoogleWeatherOpenAPI/blob/main/wiki/Credentials.md): copy-paste identity for every client
- [Python library](https://github.com/MrFaDeveloper/GoogleWeatherOpenAPI/blob/main/wiki/Python-Library.md): install, WeatherClient, CLI, REST proxy
- [REST proxy](https://github.com/MrFaDeveloper/GoogleWeatherOpenAPI/blob/main/wiki/REST-Proxy.md): localhost JSON endpoints
- [Endpoints index](https://github.com/MrFaDeveloper/GoogleWeatherOpenAPI/blob/main/docs/endpoints/README.md): all RPCs by domain
- [Network stack](https://github.com/MrFaDeveloper/GoogleWeatherOpenAPI/blob/main/wiki/Architecture.md): Cronet/gRPC/host list
- [FINDINGS](https://github.com/MrFaDeveloper/GoogleWeatherOpenAPI/blob/main/wiki/Architecture.md): reverse notes and live proof
- [OpenAPI YAML](https://github.com/MrFaDeveloper/GoogleWeatherOpenAPI/blob/main/openapi/openapi.yaml): gRPC-as-HTTP operations
- [OpenAPI JSON](https://github.com/MrFaDeveloper/GoogleWeatherOpenAPI/blob/main/openapi/openapi.json): same surface machine-readable
- [Postman guide EN](https://github.com/MrFaDeveloper/GoogleWeatherOpenAPI/blob/main/docs/postman-guide.md)
- [Postman guide RU](https://github.com/MrFaDeveloper/GoogleWeatherOpenAPI/blob/main/docs/postman-guide.ru.md)
- [Vibe coders](https://github.com/MrFaDeveloper/GoogleWeatherOpenAPI/blob/main/wiki/Vibe-Coders.md): paste into Cursor/Claude/Copilot

## Examples

- [Python quickstart](https://github.com/MrFaDeveloper/GoogleWeatherOpenAPI/blob/main/examples/quickstart.py): WeatherClient timezone + weather
- [CLI usage](https://github.com/MrFaDeveloper/GoogleWeatherOpenAPI/blob/main/wiki/Python-Library.md): `python -m google_weather weather --lat ...`

## API surface (read, API-key)

- GetLocationTimeZone → IANA timezone string
- GetLocationName → place labels + place id
- GetEssentialsWeather → full brief (~30–40 KB protobuf)
- GetAirQuality → U.S. AQI categories
- GetPollen → Weed/Tree/Grass
- GetAirQualityMapLayers → air-quality-heatmap
- GetPrecipitationMapLayers → precip tile keys
- GetMapTileTemplate → `https://mt0.google.com/vt?bpb=`

## Default credentials (always send)

- Host: `pixelweatherhub-pa.googleapis.com`
- Header `X-Goog-Api-Key: AIzaSyCO1vbjEq1ZOZ1YKpksQY_MZuClk4acU_U`
- Header `X-Android-Package: com.google.android.apps.weather`
- Header `X-Android-Cert: fe96f0c14f56c8c0ce26a654576fd8829224ed49`
- Header `pixel-weather-client-id: pixel-weather-mobile`
